mapper.select: SELECT JOB_NUMBER, JOB_NAME FROM TBL_JOB_GROUP ORDER BY JOB_NUMBER
SELECT JOB_QUESTION_NUMBER, JOB_QUESTION_CONTENT FROM TBL_JOB_RECOMMEND_QUESTION ORDER BY JOB_QUESTION_NUMBER
SELECT JOB_QUESTION_NUMBER, JOB_QUESTION_CONTENT FROM TBL_JOB_RECOMMEND_QUESTION WHERE JOB_QUESTION_NUMBER = #{jobQuestionNumber}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS RNUM, A.* FROM ( SELECT JR.JOB_RESULT_NUMBER, JR.USER_NUMBER, U.USER_NAME, JR.JOB_NUMBER, JG.JOB_NAME, JR.JOB_RESULT_STATUS, JR.JOB_RESULT_CREATED_DATE, JR.JOB_RESULT_CONFIRM_DATE FROM TBL_JOB_RESULT JR JOIN TBL_USER U ON JR.USER_NUMBER = U.USER_NUMBER LEFT JOIN TBL_JOB_GROUP JG ON JR.JOB_NUMBER = JG.JOB_NUMBER ORDER BY JR.JOB_RESULT_NUMBER DESC ) A ) WHERE RNUM BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow}

SELECT JR.JOB_RESULT_NUMBER, JR.USER_NUMBER, U.USER_NAME, U.USER_ID, JR.JOB_RESULT_STATUS, JG.JOB_NAME, JR.JOB_RESULT_CREATED_DATE, JR.JOB_RESULT_CONFIRM_DATE, JRA.JOB_QUESTION_NUMBER, JRA.JOB_QUESTION_CONTENT_SNAPSHOT, JRA.ANSWER_CONTENT FROM TBL_JOB_RESULT JR JOIN TBL_USER U ON JR.USER_NUMBER = U.USER_NUMBER LEFT JOIN TBL_JOB_GROUP JG ON JR.JOB_NUMBER = JG.JOB_NUMBER JOIN TBL_JOB_RESULT_ANSWER JRA ON JR.JOB_RESULT_NUMBER = JRA.JOB_RESULT_NUMBER WHERE JR.JOB_RESULT_NUMBER = #{jobResultNumber} ORDER BY JRA.JOB_QUESTION_NUMBER
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_JOB_RESULT SET JOB_NUMBER = #{jobNumber}, JOB_RESULT_STATUS = '판정완료', JOB_RESULT_CONFIRM_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE JOB_RESULT_NUMBER = #{jobResultNumber}
